_comment: Representative Indian refineries with crude-slate compatibility. api_min/api_max = acceptable crude API gravity. sulfur_max_pct = max sulfur the config handles. capacity_kbd = nameplate thousand barrels/day. A supplier crude is compatible if its API gravity and sulfur fall within these bounds.

refineries.name: Jamnagar (Reliance)
refineries.note: High-complexity; can run heavy sour crude.

refineries.name: Paradip (IOCL)
refineries.note: East coast; well placed for non-Gulf imports.
